meta.title: Onvo
meta.description: B2B invoicing verified on-chain with World ID

pay.title: Payment
pay.invalidToken: This value is not a valid packed invoice ID.
pay.notFound: Invoice not found on-chain (or wrong network).
pay.emitterWorldIdHint: Recorded on-chain when the invoice was created. Compare with the issuer’s proof if needed.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page does not exist or the link may be incorrect. Use the navigation or the shortcuts below.

account.title: Your rights
account.description: Here is some information about your rights in The Ballot Project.

chairPerson.title: Chair person
chairPerson.description: The address that owns The Ballot Project.

proposalsList.title: Proposals
proposalsList.description: List of available proposals for the vote.
proposalsList.name: Name

votersCount.title: Voters count
votersCount.description: The total number of registered voters in The Ballot Project.

winningProposal.title: Winning proposal
winningProposal.description: The proposal that currently has the most votes.

voteCard.title: Vote
voteCard.description: As a registered voter, you can vote for a proposal.
voteCard.alreadyVoted: You have already voted in this ballot.

giveRight.title: Give right to vote
giveRight.description: As an admin, you can grant the right to vote to another address.

delegate.title: Delegate
delegate.description: As a registered voter, you can delegate your voting power to another address.
delegate.cannotDelegate: You cannot delegate your vote because you have already voted in this ballot.

eventsTable.recentDescription: The last five events from the ballot contract.
eventsTable.allDescription: Complete overview of recent events from the ballot contract.

voterEventsTable.title: Voter registrations
voterEventsTable.description: Recent voter registration and delegation events from the ballot contract.

voteEventsTable.title: Voting activity
voteEventsTable.description: Recent voting events from the ballot contract.

auth.tagline: B2B invoicing powered by World ID
auth.verifyIntro: Verify your identity with World ID to access the platform.
auth.initError: Failed to initialize verification. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Invoices issued from your wallet on Arc Testnet.
dashboard.connectWalletHint: Connect your wallet to see invoices linked to this address.
dashboard.emptyState: No invoices stored locally. Create one or import IDs into storage.

detail.notFound: Invoice not found on-chain (or wrong network).

commission.title: Onvo fee (on payment)
commission.gross: Gross amount (debited from payer, smallest units)
commission.net: Net to issuer after fee (smallest units)
commission.note: The payer must approve the gross amount; the contract forwards the fee to Onvo then the remainder to the issuer.
commission.unavailable: Could not load commission settings from the registry.

form.successSubtitle: Share the payment link with your client.
form.title: New invoice
form.subtitle: Fill in the form — the preview updates (300 ms).
form.walletConnectHint: Connect an issuer wallet to sign the transaction.
form.firstInvoiceHint: First invoice with this wallet: when you click “Generate invoice”, the World ID orb opens to register your address on-chain, then the PDF and transaction follow.
form.invoiceNumberChainError: Could not read the next ID — check Arc network and registry address, or enter a number manually.
form.summaryLine: Subtotal excl. tax: {{ht}} — VAT: {{vat}} — Total incl. tax: {{ttc}}

preview.footer: Document generated by Onvo — on-chain hash at issuance.

registerEmitter.title: On-chain issuer registration
registerEmitter.description: A registerWithWorldId transaction links your wallet to World ID on Arc. Use the same wallet you use to sign invoices.
registerEmitter.button: Register my wallet with World ID

errors.worldIdV3Expected: Expected World ID v3 response (Orb legacy).
errors.worldIdV4IncompleteProof: Incomplete v4 proof (expected at least 5 elements).
errors.worldIdProofDecodeFailed: Could not decode World ID proof.
errors.worldIdProofFormatUnsupported: Unsupported proof format (use Orb legacy or v4 without session).

validation.clientStreetRequired: Client street and number are required

toast.arcNetworkRequired: Arc Testnet (5042002) required — switch network in your wallet.
toast.pdfNotStored: No PDF stored locally for this invoice.
toast.walletIssuerRequired: Connect your issuer wallet to sign the invoice.
toast.receiptNoId: Transaction OK but invoiceId not found in logs.
toast.verifyingOnChain: On-chain check in progress, try again shortly.
toast.connectWalletFirst: Connect your wallet first (same address as for invoices).

hero.subtitle: Create certified invoices, prove your identity with World ID, and get paid in stablecoins — all secured on-chain.

worldId.title: World ID
worldId.subtitle: Proof of Humanity
worldId.description: Every invoice issuer is verified as a real human via World ID 4.0. No bots, no fraud — only trusted identities can create invoices on Onvo.

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.subtitle: Clear Signing
ledger.description: Every transaction is signed securely with Ledger hardware wallets. See exactly what you sign before you sign it — full transparency, zero surprises.

arc.title: Arc
arc.subtitle: Stablecoin Payments
arc.description: Pay invoices in EURC or USDC on Circle's Arc L1. Fast finality, low fees, and fully on-chain settlement for every transaction.

verify.title: Verify your identity
verify.description: Prove you are a real human with World ID — one-time setup, privacy-preserving.

create.title: Create your invoice
create.description: Fill in the details, preview in real-time, and certify on-chain with a SHA-256 hash.

paid.title: Get paid in stablecoins
paid.description: Share a unique payment link. Your client pays in EURC/USDC — settled instantly on Arc.

finalCta.title: Ready to get started?
finalCta.subtitle: Join the future of B2B invoicing. Create your first verified invoice in minutes.
